my-app@
  └─ No dependents found

  └─ dev my-app (requires latest)

  └─ @types/bun@1.3.11 (requires 1.3.11)

  └─ @types/bun@1.3.11 (requires 1.3.11)

  └─ my-app (requires ^4.4.3)

ms@2.1.3
  └─ debug@4.4.3 (requires ^2.1.3)

undici-types@7.18.2
  └─ @types/node@25.5.2 (requires ~7.18.0)
